title: The Sculking/Sculkexpansion 2
body:
Thanks to Lord_Shadow_IV for entity models and entity textures.


This is a rework of another one of my other mods, The Sculk Expansion: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-sculk-expansion . Here is an actual description: Feel like sculk is a little boring? This mod adds a lot to it. The sculk will spread and take over slowly so be aware. YOU can stop it if you find every patch and destroy it I guess. However its not that good at the spreading mechanic. So it wont take over but it will change blocks. This mod also adds things that dont have anything to do with sculk, but is mostly sculk centered.



NOT A FULL ON INFECTION other mods do that better however this mod is a expansion so if your looking for an expansion this should work.



  Comment any ideas and feedback, please.





Sculk Phases don't do anything yet beside tell you many things the sculk has killed.


Credit to T_en_M for music disc songs: https://www.youtube.com/@TenM




Finally, if your coming from my old mod I am remaking this mod from scratch so many features will not be in yet or be different.
